{
  "analysis": "All dependencies installed (timm was missing), MobileSAM weights downloaded (39MB). Now I need to verify the MobileSAM import works and explore the API, then write the convert_masks.py script.",
  "plan": "1. Verify MobileSAM imports correctly. 2. Explore the SamPredictor API (especially predict with box prompts). 3. Write the convert_masks.py script that loads MobileSAM, processes each mask's bounding box to get a refined segmentation, converts to polyline, handles overlaps, and saves the output CSV.",
  "commands": [
    {
      "keystrokes": "python3 -c "
from mobile_sam import sam_model_registry, SamPredictor
import torch
print('Import OK')

sam_checkpoint = '/app/mobile_sam.pt'
model_type = 'vit_t'

device = 'cpu'
sam = sam_model_registry[model_type](checkpoint=sam_checkpoint)
sam.to(device=device)
sam.eval()
print('Model loaded OK')

predictor = SamPredictor(sam)
print('SamPredictor created OK')
print(dir(predictor))
"
",
      "duration": 30.0
    }
  ],
  "task_complete": false
}
